title: Join an Information Session
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Join an Information Session
Register for a Virtual Information Session
Learn more about NYU Shanghai by attending one of our virtual information sessions. Our admissions counselors and current students will cover academics, research, internship and job opportunities, residential life, global experiences and more!
Click here to find available dates and register for a virtual information session.
Pre-recorded Info Session
NYU Shanghai on your time. Click "play" to be guided through the application process, financial aid, student life, and academic resources on demand.
